attacking_style: Extreme long-range breakaway specialist willing to commit to 200km solo efforts for jersey points even when victory is impossible. Prioritizes classification objectives over stage wins.
team_tactics: Operates with high autonomy in breakaways; team allows opportunistic moves for secondary classifications rather than stage-winning domestique duties.
terrain_preference: KOM point-gathering terrain; thrives in breakaway scenarios on stages where specialists won't contest intermediate climbs. Third-week sprint stages where degradation creates openings.
vulnerability: Lacks pure finishing speed against specialists; breakaway efforts appear primarily classification-focused rather than stage-winning capable. Energy expenditure model unsustainable for GC contention.
key_patterns: Willing to lead solo breakaways for 99% of 200km+ stages for classification points (2017)
Targets third-week opportunities when specialist form degrades, mixing with faster finishers (2018)
Demonstrates exceptional breakaway commitment despite inevitable catch, prioritizing KOM objectives over energy conservation (2017)
Operates as versatile domestique who capitalizes on degraded sprint fields late in Grand Tours (2018)
form_trajectory: positive: Evolved from pure breakaway kamikaze (2017) to tactically opportunistic domestique exploiting third-week degradation (2018)
